title: chrysanthemum anethifolium
intro: Chrysanthemum anethifolium, also known as yomogi or mugwort, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid digestion and relieve menstrual cramps due to its spasmolytic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of chrysanthemum anethifolium include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Chrysanthemum anethifolium is often prepared as a tea or used in herbal infusions, and its dried leaves and stems can also be used in traditional medicine to create capsules or tinctures.
